notes: RC evidence bundle for v0.3.5-rc.1. Delivers SLICE-60: setup/bootstrap module, docker-compose.prod.yml, install.sh, Helm chart, Docker Hub publishing gate. Two deployment blockers found and fixed in this session: (1) setup.html not copied to dist/ by tsc — fixed by extending the build script and correcting the fallback path (../../ → ../../../); (2) docker-images.yml failing all matrix jobs when DOCKERHUB_TOKEN is absent — fixed with conditional Docker Hub gate. FreeSWITCH smoke 26932864772 passed on rc/v0.3.5 at 541cac5 (enlogy@10.0.0.32). Helm lint and template passed on enlogy@10.0.0.32. docker-compose.prod.yml smoke with GHCR images deferred to post-tag validation before production promotion.

slice_60_evidence.setup_module: Integration tests (setup.integration.test.ts) pass in CI run 26932617059: sentinel present/absent, /setup locked after bootstrap, headless bootstrap idempotency, admin email allowlist enforcement. Controller unit tests (setup.controller.test.ts) and service unit tests (setup.service.test.ts) also pass.
slice_60_evidence.helm_lint: helm lint charts/managecallai/ passes (1 chart linted, 0 failed) on enlogy@10.0.0.32 at commit 541cac5. helm template renders all 8 resource kinds (Secret, ConfigMap, PVC, Service, Deployment×3, Job) with exit 0.
slice_60_evidence.docker_compose_prod_smoke: PASSED on enlogy@10.0.0.32 with locally-built image at commit 541cac5. docker-compose.prod.yml stack (postgres + api) started successfully. /health returned 200 with db:ok. Wizard path: /setup returned HTTP 200 with 7407-byte HTML when SETUP_* vars absent. Headless path: headless bootstrap auto-ran and set sentinel when SETUP_ADMIN_EMAIL + SETUP_ADMIN_PASSWORD present, locking /setup to 404. GHCR image pull requires GHCR package visibility to be set to public (packages default to private; not possible with current token scope — manual step before production promotion).
slice_60_evidence.install_sh: install.sh present and reviewed. Generates secrets via openssl rand -hex 32, writes .env.production, prints next-steps. Does not auto-start containers.
slice_60_evidence.env_template: .env.production.example present with all required variables and generation commands. SETUP_ADMIN_EMAIL / SETUP_ADMIN_PASSWORD clearly marked 'remove after first boot'.
slice_60_evidence.docker_hub: docker-images.yml updated to gate Docker Hub login on credential availability (DOCKERHUB_USERNAME + DOCKERHUB_TOKEN secrets). GHCR publishing is unconditional. Docker Hub publishes once secrets are configured in repo settings.

production_preflight: pnpm production:preflight --check-config passes in dev. Target-environment run required before production promotion.
production_e2e: FreeSWITCH smoke run 26932864772 passed all production E2E steps on enlogy@10.0.0.32 at commit 541cac5 (rc/v0.3.5): API health, DB contracts, FreeSWITCH ESL profile, runtime directory/dialplan lookup, IVR lifecycle, SIP REGISTER, Go agent ESL, FreeSWITCH hardening (0 findings), SIP TLS/SRTP/NAT smoke, and observability query. Evidence artifact: freeswitch-smoke-26932864772 (90-day retention). https://github.com/gokbilge/manageCallAI/actions/runs/26932864772
production_soak: RC-topology soak evidence inherited from v0.3.0 (smoke run 26903877370, 2026-06-03). v0.3.5 adds no changes to the call path, rate limiting, or SLO-affecting hot paths. All SLICE-60 changes affect setup-time paths only (bootstrap, /setup wizard, Helm chart, Docker Compose). A fresh soak is not required for the setup/packaging slice.
production_slo: SLO evidence from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/runtime-slo-evidence-2026-06-03.json): /health/ready p99 8ms, /api/v1/freeswitch/directory p99 15ms, /api/v1/freeswitch/dialplan p99 22ms — all within targets. No hot-path changes in v0.3.5.
restore_smoke: Restore evidence inherited from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/restore-evidence-enlogy-2026-06-02.json). v0.3.5 adds migration 0052_system_config.sql; restore path (pg_restore) is unaffected. setup_complete sentinel is re-written by bootstrap on a fresh database.
rate_limit_topology: Rate limiting unchanged from v0.3.0. Setup wizard has a separate in-process rate limiter (5 req/min/IP) isolated from the main Redis-backed rate limiter.
carrier_interop: Inherited from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/carrier-interop-evidence-fusionpbx-2026-06-02.json). No carrier or call-path changes in v0.3.5.
log_redaction: Log redaction evidence from smoke run 26932864772 on enlogy@10.0.0.32 at commit 541cac5 (rc/v0.3.5). Artifact: freeswitch-smoke-26932864772.
rotation_rehearsal: Runtime token rotation configuration validated in smoke run 26932864772 (rotation rehearsal config check step). Live rotation rehearsal must be performed before production promotion. Template: docs/ops/templates/rotation-rehearsal-evidence-template.json.
network_config: Production network config evidence from smoke run 26932864772 on enlogy@10.0.0.32 at commit 541cac5 (rc/v0.3.5). Artifact: freeswitch-smoke-26932864772.
security_review: CodeQL run 26932617073 clean. FreeSWITCH hardening 0 findings (smoke run 26932864772). Log redaction: 0 scan findings from deployment logs. Prior CodeQL exclusions for RFC 3261-mandated MD5 and CI self-signed TLS remain in effect.

operator_signoff.name: Fatih Kucukpetek
operator_signoff.notes: RC signoff for v0.3.5-rc.1. SLICE-60 setup/bootstrap slice delivered. Two deployment blockers identified and fixed this session. All CI gates pass. Helm lint/template pass. docker-compose.prod.yml smoke with GHCR images and live rotation rehearsal remain as gates before production promotion.

known_gaps_before_production: GHCR image pull from docker-compose.prod.yml requires packages to be made public (GitHub → Profile → Packages → Change visibility to Public for each managecallai-* package)
DOCKERHUB_USERNAME + DOCKERHUB_TOKEN secrets must be configured in repo to enable Docker Hub publishing
